item.title: Carney Gets His Free Hand
item.description: The new Liberal majority in Parliament will continue the Trudeau status quo, with minor modifications.

item.title: Turkey Is the Weak Link in Trump’s Economic War on Iran
item.description: The nation’s regulatory and commercial environment remains a critical conduit for Tehran.

item.title: Manufacturing Racism
item.description: The Southern Poverty Law Center has been secretly funding ‘informants’ and infiltrators in multiple white supremacist groups around the country, the D...

item.title: Discovering Raimundo de Madrazo and Spain’s Sparkling 19th Century
item.description: The Meadows Museum in Dallas shows us there’s lots happening in Spanish art between Goya and Picasso.

item.title: What Business Do Democrats Have in Barcelona?
item.description: Why would they cozy up to ‘global progressives’ in a faraway leftist enclave?
